title: Player Finder
description: Displays the nearest player’s name, distance, and direction directly on your HUD — no commands or compass needed.
body:
# 🧭 Player Finder

**Player Finder** is a **client-side utility mod** for Minecraft that makes multiplayer navigation simple and intuitive.  
Instead of typing commands, players use a **dedicated in-game menu** to instantly see:

- 🎯 **Nearest Player Tracking** → Displays the closest player to you  
- 📏 **Distance in Blocks** → Shows exactly how far away they are  
- 🧭 **Direction Indicator** → Points you toward their location for quick navigation  
- 👥 **Player Count Display** → Tells you how many other players are detected nearby  

---

## ✨ Key Highlights
- **Client-side only** → Each player installs it individually; no server setup required  
- **Smooth experience with v1.1.0+** → Recommended for stability and performance improvements  
- **Lightweight & efficient** → Minimal impact on FPS  
- **Detection Scope** → Works when an entity is rendered by the client, even if it’s not currently on your screen (does not scan the entire map)  
- **Compatible with Fabric** → Supports Minecraft 1.21.1 – 1.21.8  

---

## 🔖 Recommended Version
For the **best performance and smoother gameplay**, it is strongly advised to use **Player Finder v1.1.0 or newer**.  
Earlier builds are functional but may lack optimizations and polish.
